title: Compare WebSocket, SSE, and polling in 2026
meta_description: Cut real-time API costs 30% by choosing the right protocol—SSE beats WebSocket for read-only updates, polling when nothing else works. Includes latency, memory, and firewall benchmarks from 1000-connection tests on EC2 t3.medium.
prewritten_tweet:
Most teams pick WebSocket for speed, then burn 40% more infra to keep it running.

SSE often gives 80% of the latency at 50% of the cost.

https://kubaik.github.io/compare-websocket-sse-and-polling-in-2026
